title: Review or develop an Emergency Animal Disease Response Plan
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Review or develop an Emergency Animal Disease Response Plan demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Source relevant documentation for EADRP

pcs.text: Identify sections of the Australian Veterinary Emergency Plan (AUSVETPLAN) applicable to emergency animal disease responses at meat processing premises
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify sections of the Australian Veterinary Emergency Plan (AUSVETPLAN) applicable to emergency animal disease responses at meat processing premises?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify sections of the Australian Veterinary Emergency Plan (AUSVETPLAN) applicable to emergency animal disease responses at meat processing premises.

pcs.text: Identify regulations, Australian Standards, templates and guidance information applicable to emergency animal disease responses at meat processing premises
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify regulations, Australian Standards, templates and guidance information applicable to emergency animal disease responses at meat processing premises?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify regulations, Australian Standards, templates and guidance information applicable to emergency animal disease responses at meat processing premises.

pcs.text: Locate the current EADRP or documents relevant to emergency animal disease response
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Locate the current EADRP or documents relevant to emergency animal disease response?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Locate the current EADRP or documents relevant to emergency animal disease response.

pcs.text: Determine current key contact authorities for responding to emergency animal disease events and their scope of responsibility
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine current key contact authorities for responding to emergency animal disease events and their scope of responsibility?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine current key contact authorities for responding to emergency animal disease events and their scope of responsibility.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop or review EADRP according to Chapter 4 AUSVETPLAN Enterprise Manual Meat Processing – Response plans in an infected or dangerous contact premises.

elements.title: Test EADRP
